title: Explore Ruins: The Aether - Dungeons & Structures
description: New dungeons and structures in the Aether dimension.
body:
![mod logo with three pictures of dungeons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/78b593d0c89e99354f12254cc65421edd6258a8a.png)
**Available on [Curseforge](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/explore-ruins-aether) & [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/explore-ruins-aether)**

**Requires: [The Aether](https://modrinth.com/mod/aether)**

## 📖**About:**
**Explore Ruins: The Aether** is a lightweight structure generation mod that improves your adventures and world exploration in The Aether dimension. Most structures have rare variants or minor random differences, so there's a chance to encounter something new even on your 50th playthrough.



## 🏰**Structures:**
![moa bird in nest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/be10954c927711cb0d5aa11b26e7a82082062680.png)
### **Moa Nest**
_'A small island is a preferred nesting ground for Moa birds'_

![floating island with a sky lake and dock](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f8ec87595b2e4f5dfd45d768a8e91c19143f8801.png)
### **Sky Lake**
_'A floating island with a lake is a perfect place for fishing in the paradise!'_

![a holy stone circle with a tree on a floating island](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7fd6397ae421a861e86107232ed5085f03f2fe61.png)
### **Holystone Circle**
_'An ancient circular structure made of sacred stone may hide something valuable... or not'_

![a sky shrine with pillars made of angelic stone](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/08d29b453a1b5a01f108a4a025f6a26225d0d3b2.png)
### **Holy Shrine**
_'A sacred altar containing a chest with precious offerings'_

![a flying valkyrie ship with cloud sails](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8edaea16ed7fe108c9786e96d3cba963596baf0f.png)
### **Valkyrie Ship**
_'A flying ship with aercloud sails used by valkyries for their travels and numerous battles'_

![an interior of library with bookcase, potted plants and chandelier](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ceaa397f09c87679a06d531ab8884e8bf13dcddc.png)
### **Valkyrie Library**
_'A smaller antique building where valkyries and mimics guard ancient knowledge'_

![a red room with glowstone lanterns and fiery monsters](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a30a38faec0e00df9e4d8734374ecd637803fedb.png)
### **Small Hellfire Dungeon**
_'This golden oak island conceals scorching rooms that are dangerous even without the help of mighty Sun Spirit'_

## 📦 Compatibility & Recommended Mods
This mod should be compatible with everything by default. It's made for use in any modpacks.
However, there are mods that go especially very well with this one.

- [Dragon Survival](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dragons-survival) - flying like a dragon through the aether is more fun than building bridges!
- [Realm RPG: Fallen Adventurers](https://modrinth.com/mod/realm-rpg-fallen-adventurers) - even more exploration, skeletons generate well alongside new structures.
- [Aether: Basic Ores](https://modrinth.com/mod/aether-basic-ores) - even fewer empty areas of the landscape are empty, look for valuable ores!
- [Farmers Structures](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/farmers-structures) - even more new houses & structures in the aether dimension.
- [Farmer's Delight](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/farmers-delight) - structures can contain items and blocks useful for cooking, so there is less need to leave aether.
- [Aether Delight](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aether-delight) - makes many items from structure chests even more useful for crafting and cooking.


## 💬 Permissions

✔️ You are allowed to include this mod in [Curseforge](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/explore-ruins-aether) & [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/explore-ruins-aether) modpacks and use this mod in your videos. A link to the mod page in the description is highly appreciated.

❌ You are not allowed to reupload this mod to any other websites/launchers/apps, use any contents of this mod (structures, tags, etc) in other projects, put this mod behind any adfly-like links, sell this mod in any way or include in paid modpacks - this mod is free for all players.
